generated_oml:
instance FirstAxisSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "The first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, with maximum working range of [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed of 75°/s."
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGear, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensors
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor for rotational energy transformation, with input current I_M and output torque τ_M."
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission for rotational energy transformation, output torque τ_G."
]

instance CycloidalGear : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear for rotational energy transformation, output torque τ_out."
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor for measuring position angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox for measuring position angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensors for measuring input current."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensors
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current from current sensors."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position angle from motor encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredSecondaryPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position angle from secondary encoder behind gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ReferenceMotorOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Reference motor output including torque and angular velocity."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ReferenceGearwheelOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Reference gearwheel output torque."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ReferenceSystemOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Reference system output torque."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedOutputs : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from friction models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for joint friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for joint friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for joint friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance AAS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for traceability and data management."
    DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityService
]

instance SysMLModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the system."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation and friction modeling."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming from physical to virtual."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance Dashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization of robot data."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization within a unified dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Traceability of data generation for understanding physical relationships."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction identification data applied to improve robot control accuracy, enabling better understanding of physical relationships for decision making."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow comprising data traces, processing components, engineering models, simulation models, and data calculation models integrated for friction identification and visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, with continuous monitoring over operating time to account for wear, different tools, and applications."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) standard and SysML for modeling."
]
